segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Had the writer's money been stolen?
I entered the hotel manager's office and sat down.

translations.zh-Hans: 我走进饭店经理的办公室，坐了下来。

segments.text: I had just lost fifty pounds and I felt very upset.

translations.zh-Hans: 我刚丢了50英镑，感到非常沮丧。

segments.text: I left the money in my room, I said, and it's not there now.

translations.zh-Hans: “我把钱放在房间里，”我说，“可现在不见了。”

segments.text: The manager was sympathetic, but he could do nothing.

translations.zh-Hans: 经理很同情我，却无能为力。

segments.text: Everyone's losing money these days, he said.
He started to complain about this wicked world but was interrupted by a knock at the door.

translations.zh-Hans: 他开始抱怨这个邪恶的世界，却被敲门声打断了。

segments.text: A girl came in and put an envelope on his desk.

translations.zh-Hans: 一个姑娘走进来，把一个信封放在他的桌上。

segments.text: I found this outside this gentleman's room, she said.

translations.zh-Hans: “这是我在这位先生的房间外面发现的，”她说。

segments.text: Well, I said to the manager, there is still some honesty in this world.

translations.zh-Hans: “好吧，”我对经理说，“这个世界上还是有诚实可言的。”
